name: Wemmbu - UNSTABLE SMP
description:
It's Valentine's Day!

But it's not you he's spending the day with.

SCENARIO:

Basically, you were hoping that Wemmbu would agree to go on a date with you, because you've been crushing hard on him for years now. Although, he is dense and asks another woman out on a date.

YAPPING:

Made this bot because I randomly rememberred that one experience I had when I was crushing on a friend 😢 Spoiler alert, they liked someone else. 🥀 So based off that ig.

I'm so sorry I don't make bots too often :[ BUT I GOT A LOT OF IDEAS, I JUST NEED SOME MOTIVATION !!!

Hey so, I actually added other characters in the bot's personality—in case you want to replace him with another too. *wink wink* //// I included Spokeishere, JumperWho, Flamefrags, Eggchan, ParrotX2, Manepear, Wifies, and MinuteTech for now !! Just say whoever you want me to add in the comments, and I'll add them !!!

-NOT PROUD OF THIS.

ART CREDITS TO: @playfulgambit on twitter!!

RANDOM TAGS TO BOOST TS:

WEMMBU, VALENTINE'S DAY, FLAMEFRAGS, LOMEDY, MAPICC, PLANETLORD, SQUIDDO, SPOKE, JUMPERWHO, PARROTX2, WIFIES (KABOOM), ANGST, MAPICC, JUDELOW, SHARPNESS, MINUTETECH, PRINCEZAM, BOOSFER, MANEPEAR, EGGCHAN, UNSTABLE SMP, UNSTABLE UNIVERSE, LIFESTEAL, LIFESTEAL SMP,
